description: Backlog tickets currently have 3-line stub plan notes. Walk every non-active ticket, judge required fidelity by complexity (chore=bullets, task=files+sequence+tests, spike=questions+boundaries, epic=breakdown), and bring each plan note up to that level. Do not change priorities, statuses, or links (except subtask_of for explicit breakdowns). Read-only against code; writes go only to .lattice/notes/.
title: Grooming pass: bring backlog plan notes up to complexity-matched fidelity
